title: Santa throwing it back 🎅
prompt_text: Santa Claus is on the porch of a house, seen from a low-angle, wide-angle perspective. The porch has white columns and a white ceiling, illuminated by a single bright overhead light. Santa, wearing his traditional red suit with white fur trim and a black belt, is facing away from the camera. Behind him, the sky is a deep blue, characteristic of dusk or early night, with faint silhouettes of trees and a distant horizon visible. The ground is a concrete porch floor, with some fallen leaves scattered near the edge. The overall lighting is a mix of the bright porch light and the fading natural light.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: Santa Claus is on the porch of a house, seen from a low-angle, wide-angle perspective. The porch has white columns and a white ceiling, illuminated by a single bright overhead light. Santa, wearing his traditional red suit with white fur trim and a black belt, is facing away from the camera. Behind him, the sky is a deep blue, characteristic of dusk or early night, with faint silhouettes of trees and a distant horizon visible. The ground is a concrete porch floor, with some fallen leaves scattered near the edge. The overall lighting is a mix of the bright porch light and the fading natural light.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle, wide-angle fisheye lens, static shot. The camera is positioned looking up at Santa, emphasizing the porch ceiling and columns curving around him.

actions: Santa Claus bends his knees and begins to twerk, moving his hips rhythmically.
He continues to twerk with exaggerated movements, maintaining a low stance.
Santa's movements are in time with the music.
He remains facing away from the camera throughout the dance.
dialogue: Uptempo, rhythmic music plays with a strong bassline, suggesting a hip-hop or electronic dance track.
